title: Macrocytic anaemia
body_html:
Macrocytic anaemia can be divided into causes associated with a megaloblastic bone marrow and those with a normoblastic bone marrow

Megaloblastic causesNormoblastic causes
  • vitamin B12 deficiency
  • folate deficiency
  • alcohol
  • liver disease
  • hypothyroidism
  • pregnancy
  • reticulocytosis
  • myelodysplasia
  • drugs: cytotoxics
2
